title: cymbalaria aequitriloba
intro: Cymbalaria aequitriloba, also known as the Mediterranean ivy or Kenilworth ivy, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its distinctive yellow flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cymbalaria aequitriloba include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health concerns.
